creator: stevenhaocheng@163.com
text: UPDATE2 (2020.02.25 12:22:46 CST): Reinstalled system, I still can't use it. What's more, when I tried to download (using ftp) the source of autoconf and its dependency m4 from ftp://ftp.gnu.org, it can download successfully, but then when extracting the .tar.xz archive, it gives same error as the summary: Lzma library error: No progress is possible.
